visual_description: A person's hand is seen opening a dark wooden door in a dimly lit, green-hued room. The door opens to reveal an older man in a light-colored suit and a younger man in a patterned shirt standing together. The older man gestures with his hand as he looks towards the right, while the younger man stands beside him.
audio_description: A male voice calls out a name repeatedly in a loud, urgent tone, followed by a loud, sustained electronic buzzer sound.
